metadata.title: States PCS: Tamil Nadu GK Questions for TNPSC Examinations

questions.question: Which traditional water structure in Tamil Nadu is commonly used for community-based rainwater harvesting?
questions.explanation: Ooranis are village-level water harvesting ponds in Tamil Nadu, vital for groundwater recharge and local water needs.

questions.question: Which of the following estuarine systems in Tamil Nadu is designated as a Ramsar site and is renowned for its mangrove forests?
questions.explanation: Pichavaram Estuary, a Ramsar site in Cuddalore district, is famous for India’s second-largest mangrove forests.

questions.question: Which hill region in Tamil Nadu is renowned for the rare Neelakurinji flower bloom that occurs every 12 years?
questions.explanation: The Nilgiri Hills experience the Neelakurinji (Strobilanthes kunthiana) bloom every 12 years, highlighting their ecological significance within the Western Ghats.
